title: COUNSELING SERVICES - 211info
text: VETERAN ADVOCATES OF ORE-IDA COUNSELING SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides counseling sessions with a therapist from the Vet Center, an Idaho-based Veterans Affairs program which visits the location regularly. 180 W Idaho Avenue Ontario, OR 97914 Eligibility: Veterans; does not require receipt of VA benefits Hours: Every other Friday Email (541) 889-1978 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Office Manager (541) 889-1978 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Proof of veteran status AREA SERVED: Baker, Grant, Harney, and Malheur Counties TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located on W Idaho Avenue, two blocks west of Oregon Street between the Elks and Looks Nu Car Wash. Services: Individual Counseling * Veterans Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - VETERAN ADVOCATES OF ORE-IDA FOOD PANTRY INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - ADVOCACY AND SUPPORT FOR VETERANS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. VETERAN ADVOCATES OF ORE-IDA
